prompt: A misty lakeside at dawn. A calm lake surface reflects the golden-pink dawn sky. Reeds and cattails grow along the rocky shoreline on both sides. Pine-covered mountains rise in the distance through layers of morning fog. Soft diffused light with warm golden tones breaking through the mist. To the left along the shore, a weathered wooden dock extends into the lake beside a small rowboat tied to a post. To the right, a cluster of birch trees stands near a flat rocky outcrop where a tackle box and thermos rest. Behind the viewer, a gravel trail leads up to a log cabin with smoke drifting from its chimney. First-person viewer. First-person view with both hands gripping a bamboo fishing rod at the bottom center of the frame, the rod extending straight forward over the lake. The rod rotates together with the viewer's perspective when turning.

settings.movement: The fishing rod must rotate together with the viewer's perspective. When turning left/right, the rod should swing accordingly, always staying in the viewer's hands.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A misty lakeside at dawn. A calm lake surface reflects the golden-pink dawn sky. Reeds and cattails grow along the rocky shoreline on both sides. Pine-covered mountains rise in the distance through layers of morning fog. Soft diffused light with warm golden tones breaks through the mist.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: To the left along the shore, a weathered wooden dock extends into the lake beside a small rowboat tied to a post. To the right, a cluster of birch trees stands near a flat rocky outcrop where a tackle box and thermos rest. Behind the viewer, a gravel trail leads up to a log cabin with smoke drifting from its chimney.
